title: Cooking Mecha Iron Chef
short_description: Pilot cauldron mechs made from old war machines: gather giant vegetables, cook with the Plink-o-matic, and autoturret-feed soup to hungry villagers in the Caldera.
description: Giant, delicious vegetables sprout from the fertile soil of the Caldera. So giant, in fact, that the people that inhabit the area repurpose long-dead military mechs into enormous cauldrons to cook them! Become a pilot of your very own cauldron mech - gather vegetables, prepare them and season them with the Plink-o-matic, and use the autoturret to fire delicious soup into the mouths of hungry villagers. Can you match their tastes and figure out the flavours of each of the 5 tasty vegetable types?
